nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cryptic warbler
nodes.summary: Cryptic warbler（Cryptic warbler，学名 Cryptosylvicola randrianasoloi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于雨林。

nodes.name: 雨林
nodes.summary: 雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联99种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、鳳冠孔雀雉、Amboyna cuckoo-dove等99种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Although found in many habitats, the cryptic warbler prefers evergreen, humid rain forest between elevation. It can be found in the canopy and sub-canopy of trees and shrubs between off the ground, with a diet consisting of insects. Its breeding season lasts from October to December
